2605.07507.title: TCMIIES: A Browser-Based LLM-Powered Intelligent Information Extraction System for Academic Literature
2605.07507.paper_summary: The exponential growth of academic publications has created an urgent need for automated tools capable of extracting structured knowledge from unstructured scientific texts. While large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in natural language understanding and information extraction, existing solutions often require specialized infrastructure, programming expertise, or fine-tuned domain-specific models that create barriers for researchers in specialized fields. This paper presents TCMIIES, a browser-based, zero-installation platform that leverages commercial LLM APIs to perform structured information extraction from academic literature. The system employs a novel schema-guided prompting framework with automatic system prompt generation, enabling researchers to define custom extraction schemas through an intuitive graphical interface without any programming. TCMIIES features a pure front-end architecture that ensures data privacy by processing all information locally in the browser, supports five major LLM providers, implements concurrent batch processing with automatic retry mechanisms, and provides intelligent field mapping for Chinese academic databases including CNKI and Wanfang. We demonstrate the system's effectiveness through comprehensive evaluation across multiple extraction scenarios in Traditional Chinese Medicine research, achieving structured output compliance rates exceeding 94\% and information extraction accuracy comparable to domain-expert annotation. The system represents a practical, accessible solution that bridges the gap between advanced LLM capabilities and domain-specific academic information extraction needs, particularly for researchers in specialized fields who require flexible, privacy-preserving, and cost-effective extraction tools.
2605.07507.paper_summary_zh: 學術出版物的指數增長創造了對能夠從非結構化科學文本中提取結構化知識的自動化工具的迫切需求。雖然大型語言模型（LLMs）在自然語言理解和信息提取方面展示了卓越的能力，但現有解決方案往往需要專門的基礎設施、編程專業知識或微調的特定領域模型，這對於專業領域的研究人員造成了障礙。本文介紹了TCMIIES，一個基於瀏覽器的零安裝平台，利用商業LLM API從學術文獻中執行結構化信息提取。該系統採用一種新穎的架構引導提示框架，並具有自動系統提示生成，使研究人員能夠通過直觀的圖形界面定義自定義提取架構，而無需任何編程。TCMIIES具有純前端架構，通過在瀏覽器中本地處理所有信息來確保數據隱私，支持五大主要LLM提供商，實現並行批處理並具有自動重試機制，並為包括CNKI和萬方在內的中國學術數據庫提供智能字段映射。我們通過對傳統中醫研究中多個提取場景的全面評估展示了系統的有效性，實現了結構化輸出合規率超過94\%，信息提取準確性可與領域專家的標註相媲美。該系統代表了一個實用的、可獲得的解決方案，彌合了先進LLM能力與特定領域學術信息提取需求之間的差距，特別是對於需要靈活、保護隱私和具成本效益的提取工具的專業領域研究人員。
2605.07507.author: Hanqing Zhao et.al.
